zh-CN.cancel_pending: 好，我先取消这次待确认操作了 🙂
zh-CN.pending_high_risk:
这个动作风险比较高，我先不直接执行。你如果确认继续，回复"确认"就行 🙂

待执行：{{summary}}
zh-CN.write_action_hint:
我识别到你想执行 EDR 写操作，但当前默认不自动执行高危动作。你可以直接发：
- /edr host-isolate <client_id>
- /edr host-release <client_id>
zh-CN.planner_unavailable: 我这边连接规划模型超时或暂时不可用，这条请求还没执行。请稍后重试；如果着急，也可以直接用 /edr 命令。
zh-CN.commands_help:
支持的 EDR 命令：

【主机管理】
- /edr hosts <hostname> 查询主机
- /edr host-isolate <client_id> 隔离主机
- /edr host-release <client_id> 恢复主机
- /edr host-black <client_id_csv> <reason> 加入主机黑名单
- /edr host-remove <client_id_csv> 从管控中移除主机
- /edr host-offline-get 查询主机离线配置
- /edr host-offline-set <status> <time> 保存主机离线配置

【事件与检出】
- /edr incidents [client_id] [page] [page_size] 查询平台事件
- /edr incident-summary <incident_id> 查询事件摘要
- /edr detections [incident_id] [page] [page_size] 查询平台行为检出
- /edr logs [client_id] [page] [page_size] 查询行为日志
- /edr incident-view <incident_id> <client_id> 查询事件详情
- /edr detection-view <detection_id> <client_id> [view_type] [process_uuid] 查询检出详情
- /edr detection-update <detection_id|ids_csv> <status> 更新检出处置状态
- /edr incident-update <ids_csv> <status> [scene] [allow] [comment] 批量处置事件

【任务管理】
- /edr tasks [page] [page_size] 查询指令任务列表
- /edr task-result <task_id> 查询任务结果

【指令下发】
- /edr send-instruction <instruction_name> <client_id> [path] 发送指令到主机

【计划管理】
- /edr plans [page] [page_size] 查询计划列表
- /edr plan-add <plan_name> <scan_type> <plan_type> <scope> [type] 创建计划
- /edr plan-edit <rid> <plan_name> <scan_type> <plan_type> <scope> <type> 编辑计划
- /edr plan-cancel <rid> 取消计划

【病毒管理】
- /edr virus-scan-record [hostname] [client_id] [page] [page_size] 病毒扫描记录
- /edr virus-by-host [hostname] [client_id] [page] [page_size] 按主机查病毒
- /edr virus-by-hash [hash] [page] [page_size] 按哈希查病毒
- /edr virus-hash-hosts <sha1> [hostname] [page] [page_size] 按哈希查关联主机

【隔离与IOC】
- /edr isolate-files [client_id] [hostname] [page] [page_size] 隔离文件列表
- /edr isolate-files-release <isolate_file_guids_csv> [isolate_file_add_exclusion] [isolate_file_release_all_hash] 放行隔离文件
- /edr isolate-files-delete <isolate_file_guids_csv> 删除隔离文件记录
- /edr iocs [ioc_action] [hash] [page] [page_size] IOC列表
- /edr ioc-add <ioc_action> <ioc_hash> [description] [expiration_date] [file_name] [host_type] 添加IOC
- /edr ioc-update <ioc_id> <ioc_hash> [ioc_action] [description] [expiration_date] 更新IOC
- /edr ioc-delete <ioc_id> 删除IOC

【IOA管理】
- /edr ioas [page] [page_size] IOA列表
- /edr ioa-add <severity> [file_name] [command_line] [description] [host_type] 添加IOA
- /edr ioa-update <ioa_id> [file_name] [command_line] [description] 更新IOA
- /edr ioa-delete <ioa_id> 删除IOA
- /edr ioa-ip [page] [page_size] IOA网络排除列表

【策略管理】
- /edr strategies [type] [page] [page_size] 策略列表
- /edr strategy-single <strategy_type> 策略详情
- /edr strategy-state 策略状态

【其他】
- /edr log-alarms [page] [page_size] 事件日志告警
- /edr instruction-policies [page] [page_size] 自动响应策略

高危操作（隔离、恢复、放行隔离文件、删除隔离文件记录、IOC/IOA管理写操作、加入黑名单、移除主机、发送指令、计划管理、更新检出处置状态、批量处置事件）需要回复「确认」后才能执行。
zh-CN.usage_host_offline_set:
用法：/edr host-offline-set <status> <time>
- status: 1-开启 2-关闭
- time: 离线超时时间（天，须大于0）
zh-CN.usage_detection_update_status:
用法：/edr detection-update <detection_id|ids_csv> <status>
- status: 1-待处置 2-处置中 3-已处置(已处理) 4-误报
- 也支持文本：待处置/处置中/已处理/误报/false positive
zh-CN.usage_batch_deal_incident:
用法：/edr incident-update <ids_csv> <status> [scene] [allow] [comment]
- status: 1-未研判 2-研判中 3-真攻击 4-误报
- scene: batch/alone (默认 batch)
- allow: true/false (默认 status=4 时为 true，否则 false)
- ids_csv: 多个 incident_id 用逗号分隔
zh-CN.usage_plan_add:
用法：/edr plan-add <plan_name> <scan_type> <plan_type> <scope> [type]
- scan_type: 1-快速扫描 2-全盘扫描 3-自定义路径扫描 4-漏洞修复 5-安装软件 6-卸载软件 7-更新软件 8-发送文件
- plan_type: 1-立即执行 2-定时执行 3-周期执行
- scope: 1-特定主机 2-主机组 3-全网主机
- type: kill_plan/leak_repair/distribute_software/distribute_file
zh-CN.usage_plan_edit:
用法：/edr plan-edit <rid> <plan_name> <scan_type> <plan_type> <scope> <type>
- scan_type: 1-快速扫描 2-全盘扫描 3-自定义路径扫描 4-漏洞修复 5-安装软件 6-卸载软件 7-更新软件 8-发送文件
- plan_type: 1-立即执行 2-定时执行 3-周期执行
- scope: 1-特定主机 2-主机组 3-全网主机
- type: kill_plan/leak_repair/distribute_software/distribute_file
zh-CN.usage_isolate_files_release:
用法：/edr isolate-files-release <isolate_file_guids_csv> [isolate_file_add_exclusion] [isolate_file_release_all_hash]
- isolate_file_guids_csv: 多个 GUID 用英文逗号分隔
- isolate_file_add_exclusion: true/false（可选，默认 false）
- isolate_file_release_all_hash: true/false（可选，默认 false）
zh-CN.usage_isolate_files_delete:
用法：/edr isolate-files-delete <isolate_file_guids_csv>
- isolate_file_guids_csv: 多个 GUID 用英文逗号分隔
zh-CN.usage_ioc_add:
用法：/edr ioc-add <ioc_action> <ioc_hash> [description] [expiration_date] [file_name] [host_type]
- ioc_action: 动作类型（如 black/white）
- ioc_hash: 哈希值（支持 MD5/SHA1/SHA256）
- description: 描述（可选）
- expiration_date: 过期时间（可选，如 2026-12-31）
- file_name: 文件名（可选）
- host_type: 主机类型（可选）
zh-CN.usage_ioc_update:
用法：/edr ioc-update <ioc_id> <ioc_hash> [ioc_action] [description] [expiration_date]
- ioc_id: IOC ID（必填）
- ioc_hash: IOC Hash（必填）
- ioc_action: 新动作类型（可选）
- description: 新描述（可选）
- expiration_date: 新过期时间（可选，如 2026-12-31）
zh-CN.usage_ioc_delete:
用法：/edr ioc-delete <ioc_id>
- ioc_id: IOC ID（必填）
zh-CN.usage_ioa_add:
用法：/edr ioa-add <severity> [file_name] [command_line] [description] [host_type]
- severity: 严重程度（必填，如 high/medium/low）
- file_name: 文件名（可选）
- command_line: 命令行（可选）
- description: 描述（可选）
- host_type: 主机类型（可选）
zh-CN.usage_ioa_update:
用法：/edr ioa-update <ioa_id> [file_name] [command_line] [description]
- ioa_id: IOA ID（必填）
- file_name: 文件名（可选）
- command_line: 命令行（可选）
- description: 新描述（可选）
zh-CN.usage_ioa_delete:
用法：/edr ioa-delete <ioa_id>
- ioa_id: IOA ID（必填）
zh-CN.usage_ioa_networks_add:
用法：/edr ioa-ip-add <exclusion_name> <ip> [host_type]
- exclusion_name: 排除名称（必填）
- ip: IP 地址（必填）
- host_type: 主机类型（可选）
zh-CN.usage_ioa_networks_update:
用法：/edr ioa-ip-update <ioa_id> [ip] [exclusion_name]
- ioa_id: IOA ID（必填）
- ip: 新 IP 地址（可选）
- exclusion_name: 新排除名称（可选）
zh-CN.usage_ioa_networks_delete:
用法：/edr ioa-ip-delete <ioa_id>
- ioa_id: IOA ID（必填）
zh-CN.usage_strategy_update:
用法：/edr strategy-update <strategy_type> <strategy_id> [key1=value1 key2=value2 ...]

必填参数：
- strategy_type: virus_scan_settings（病毒查杀设置）或 asset_registration（资产登记）
- strategy_id: 策略 ID

可选参数（key=value 格式）：
- scan_file_scope: all|recommended
- startup_scan_mode: known_dangerous|all_unknown
- archive_size_limit_enabled: true|false
- archive_size_limit: 数字（单位 MB）
- realtime_mem_cache_tech_enabled: true|false
- dynamic_cpu_monitor_enabled: true|false
- dynamic_cpu_high_percent: 1-100
- stop_realtime_on_cpu_high_enabled: true|false
- stop_realtime_cpu_high_percent: 1-100
- owl_on_realtime_enabled: true|false
- realtime_scan_archive_enabled: true|false
- runtime_max_file_size_mb: 数字
- custom_max_file_size_mb: 数字
zh-CN.unknown_command: 未识别的 EDR 命令，请使用 /edr help 查看所有可用命令。
zh-CN.unsupported_query:
我没有从你的这句话里稳定识别出可执行的 EDR 查询参数，所以先不自动调用，避免查错目标。

你可以换一种更明确的说法，例如：
- 查一下主机 MAC牛马一号 的状态
- 看一下最近的 EDR 事件第 2 页
- 查 incident_id=xxx 的 detections 第 3 页每页 20 条
- 查这个 client_id 的行为日志第 2 页
- 帮我在 macOS 日志里 hunting 最近的 exec 链

也可以直接使用命令：
- /edr hosts <hostname>
- /edr incidents [client_id] [page] [page_size]
- /edr detections [incident_id] [page] [page_size]
- /edr logs [client_id] [page] [page_size]

zh-CN.session_help:
会话命令：
• /session current
• /session list
• /session new [title]
• /session use <session_id>
• /session close
• /session delete <session_id>
zh-CN.session_none: 当前还没有活动会话，我会在你发下一条正常消息时自动新建一个。
zh-CN.session_list_head: 当前范围下的会话列表：
zh-CN.session_new_done: 已新建会话 {{session_id}}，后续消息会进入这个会话 🙂
zh-CN.session_use_done: 已切换到会话 {{session_id}}，后续消息都会进入这里。
zh-CN.session_close_done: 当前会话 {{session_id}} 已关闭，但历史还会长期保留。
zh-CN.session_not_found: 没有找到这个会话 id：{{session_id}}
zh-CN.run_interrupted: 好，我已经把当前这条会话里的执行打断了。你可以继续给我新的指令。
zh-CN.run_not_found: 当前没有正在执行的任务可供打断。

en-US.cancel_pending: Got it, I have canceled that pending action 🙂
en-US.pending_high_risk:
This action is high impact, so I will not run it yet. If you want me to continue, just reply with "confirm" 🙂

Pending action: {{summary}}
en-US.write_action_hint:
I recognized a high-risk EDR write action, but I do not auto-run it by default. You can send:
- /edr host-isolate <client_id>
- /edr host-release <client_id>
en-US.planner_unavailable: I could not reach the planning model (timeout or temporary outage), so this request was not executed. Please retry shortly, or use a direct /edr command.
en-US.commands_help:
Supported EDR commands:

【Host Management】
- /edr hosts <hostname> Query hosts
- /edr host-isolate <client_id> Isolate host
- /edr host-release <client_id> Release host
- /edr host-black <client_id_csv> <reason> Add host(s) to blacklist
- /edr host-remove <client_id_csv> Remove host(s) from management
- /edr host-offline-get Get host offline config
- /edr host-offline-set <status> <time> Save host offline config

【Events & Detections】
- /edr incidents [client_id] [page] [page_size] Query platform incidents
- /edr incident-summary <incident_id> Query incident summary
- /edr detections [incident_id] [page] [page_size] Query behavior detections
- /edr logs [client_id] [page] [page_size] Query behavior logs
- /edr incident-view <incident_id> <client_id> Query incident details
- /edr detection-view <detection_id> <client_id> [view_type] [process_uuid] Query detection details
- /edr detection-update <detection_id|ids_csv> <status> Update detection handling status
- /edr incident-update <ids_csv> <status> [scene] [allow] [comment] Batch-handle incidents

【Task Management】
- /edr tasks [page] [page_size] Query task list
- /edr task-result <task_id> Query task result

【Instruction】
- /edr send-instruction <instruction_name> <client_id> [path] Send instruction to host

【Plan Management】
- /edr plans [page] [page_size] Query plan list
- /edr plan-add <plan_name> <scan_type> <plan_type> <scope> [type] Create plan
- /edr plan-edit <rid> <plan_name> <scan_type> <plan_type> <scope> <type> Edit plan
- /edr plan-cancel <rid> Cancel plan

【Virus Management】
- /edr virus-scan-record [hostname] [client_id] [page] [page_size] Virus scan records
- /edr virus-by-host [hostname] [client_id] [page] [page_size] Query virus by host
- /edr virus-by-hash [hash] [page] [page_size] Query virus by hash
- /edr virus-hash-hosts <sha1> [hostname] [page] [page_size] Query hosts by hash

【Isolation & IOC】
- /edr isolate-files [client_id] [hostname] [page] [page_size] Isolated files list
- /edr isolate-files-release <isolate_file_guids_csv> [isolate_file_add_exclusion] [isolate_file_release_all_hash] Release isolated file(s)
- /edr isolate-files-delete <isolate_file_guids_csv> Delete isolated file records
- /edr iocs [ioc_action] [hash] [page] [page_size] IOC list
- /edr ioc-add <ioc_action> <ioc_hash> [description] [expiration_date] [file_name] [host_type] Add IOC
- /edr ioc-update <ioc_id> <ioc_hash> [ioc_action] [description] [expiration_date] Update IOC
- /edr ioc-delete <ioc_id> Delete IOC

【IOA Management】
- /edr ioas [page] [page_size] IOA list
- /edr ioa-add <severity> [file_name] [command_line] [description] [host_type] Add IOA
- /edr ioa-update <ioa_id> [file_name] [command_line] [description] Update IOA
- /edr ioa-delete <ioa_id> Delete IOA
- /edr ioa-ip [page] [page_size] IOA network exclusion list

【Strategy Management】
- /edr strategies [type] [page] [page_size] Strategy list
- /edr strategy-single <strategy_type> Strategy details
- /edr strategy-state Strategy state

【Other】
- /edr log-alarms [page] [page_size] Event log alarms
- /edr instruction-policies [page] [page_size] Instruction policies

High-risk operations (isolate, release, release isolated files, delete isolated file records, IOC/IOA management write operations, blacklist, remove hosts, send_instruction, plan management, detection status updates, incident-update) require "confirm" to execute.
en-US.usage_host_offline_set:
Usage: /edr host-offline-set <status> <time>
- status: 1-enable 2-disable
- time: offline timeout in days (must be > 0)
en-US.usage_detection_update_status:
Usage: /edr detection-update <detection_id|ids_csv> <status>
- status: 1-pending 2-in_progress 3-resolved 4-false_positive
- Text mapping also supported: pending/in_progress/resolved/false positive
en-US.usage_batch_deal_incident:
Usage: /edr incident-update <ids_csv> <status> [scene] [allow] [comment]
- status: 1-unreviewed 2-in_progress 3-true_attack 4-false_positive
- scene: batch/alone (default: batch)
- allow: true/false (default: true when status=4, otherwise false)
- ids_csv: comma-separated incident_id values
en-US.usage_plan_add:
Usage: /edr plan-add <plan_name> <scan_type> <plan_type> <scope> [type]
- scan_type: 1-Quick scan 2-Full scan 3-Custom path scan 4-Vulnerability repair 5-Install software 6-Uninstall software 7-Update software 8-Send file
- plan_type: 1-Execute now 2-Scheduled 3-Periodic
- scope: 1-Specific host 2-Host group 3-All hosts
- type: kill_plan/leak_repair/distribute_software/distribute_file
en-US.usage_plan_edit:
Usage: /edr plan-edit <rid> <plan_name> <scan_type> <plan_type> <scope> <type>
- scan_type: 1-Quick scan 2-Full scan 3-Custom path scan 4-Vulnerability repair 5-Install software 6-Uninstall software 7-Update software 8-Send file
- plan_type: 1-Execute now 2-Scheduled 3-Periodic
- scope: 1-Specific host 2-Host group 3-All hosts
- type: kill_plan/leak_repair/distribute_software/distribute_file
en-US.usage_isolate_files_release:
Usage: /edr isolate-files-release <isolate_file_guids_csv> [isolate_file_add_exclusion] [isolate_file_release_all_hash]
- isolate_file_guids_csv: comma-separated GUIDs
- isolate_file_add_exclusion: true/false (optional, default false)
- isolate_file_release_all_hash: true/false (optional, default false)
en-US.usage_ioc_add:
Usage: /edr ioc-add <ioc_action> <ioc_hash> [description] [expiration_date] [file_name] [host_type]
- ioc_action: action type (e.g. black/white)
- ioc_hash: hash value (supports MD5/SHA1/SHA256)
- description: description (optional)
- expiration_date: expiration date (optional, e.g. 2026-12-31)
- file_name: file name (optional)
- host_type: host type (optional)
en-US.usage_ioc_update:
Usage: /edr ioc-update <ioc_id> <ioc_hash> [ioc_action] [description] [expiration_date]
- ioc_id: IOC ID (required)
- ioc_hash: IOC hash (required)
- ioc_action: new action type (optional)
- description: new description (optional)
- expiration_date: new expiration date (optional, e.g. 2026-12-31)
en-US.usage_ioa_add:
Usage: /edr ioa-add <severity> [file_name] [command_line] [description] [host_type]
- severity: severity level (required, e.g. high/medium/low)
- file_name: file name (optional)
- command_line: command line (optional)
- description: description (optional)
- host_type: host type (optional)
en-US.usage_ioa_update:
Usage: /edr ioa-update <ioa_id> [file_name] [command_line] [description]
- ioa_id: IOA ID (required)
- file_name: file name (optional)
- command_line: command line (optional)
- description: new description (optional)
en-US.usage_ioa_networks_add:
Usage: /edr ioa-ip-add <exclusion_name> <ip> [host_type]
- exclusion_name: Exclusion name (required)
- ip: IP address (required)
- host_type: Host type (optional)
en-US.usage_ioa_networks_update:
Usage: /edr ioa-ip-update <ioa_id> [ip] [exclusion_name]
- ioa_id: IOA ID (required)
- ip: New IP address (optional)
- exclusion_name: New exclusion name (optional)
en-US.usage_strategy_update:
Usage: /edr strategy-update <strategy_type> <strategy_id> [key1=value1 key2=value2 ...]

Required parameters:
- strategy_type: virus_scan_settings or asset_registration
- strategy_id: strategy ID

Optional parameters (key=value format):
- scan_file_scope: all|recommended
- startup_scan_mode: known_dangerous|all_unknown
- archive_size_limit_enabled: true|false
- archive_size_limit: number (unit: MB)
- realtime_mem_cache_tech_enabled: true|false
- dynamic_cpu_monitor_enabled: true|false
- dynamic_cpu_high_percent: 1-100
- stop_realtime_on_cpu_high_enabled: true|false
- stop_realtime_cpu_high_percent: 1-100
- owl_on_realtime_enabled: true|false
- realtime_scan_archive_enabled: true|false
- runtime_max_file_size_mb: number
- custom_max_file_size_mb: number
en-US.unknown_command: Unknown EDR command. Use /edr help to see all available commands.
en-US.unsupported_query:
I could not reliably extract a safe EDR query target from that message, so I am not auto-running anything yet.

You can try a clearer request, for example:
- Check host status for MAC Niuma One
- Show recent EDR incidents page 2
- Show detections for incident_id=xxx page 3 with 20 per page
- Show behavior logs for this client_id page 2
- Hunt recent macOS exec chains in logs

Or use a command directly:
- /edr hosts <hostname>
- /edr incidents [client_id] [page] [page_size]
- /edr detections [incident_id] [page] [page_size]
- /edr logs [client_id] [page] [page_size]
